title: Trump's Iran war speech paints a grim picture for oil markets with more than 600 million barrels at risk
summary_full: Oil prices are surging as the market prepares for a longer U.S. war with Iran after President Donald Trump's national address.
summary_public: Oil prices are surging as the market prepares for a longer U.S. war with Iran after President Donald Trump's national address.
